/usr/bin/mpicxx -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/parallelfor_simd_x.dir/experimental/miniWeather_mpi_parallelfor_simd_x.cpp.o CMakeFiles/parallelfor_simd_x.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o parallelfor_simd_x   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcufft.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
